en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property in the building category, a grave traditionally attributed to Benkei. It is town-designated by Hiraizumi Town and was designated on 15 June 1976. It is located in Hiraizumi.

This is a tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a cliff-face great Buddha of Dainichi Nyorai. It is town-designated by Hiraizumi Town and was designated on 12 November 1971. It is located in Hiraizumi.
This is a tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a statue of Tamonten. It is town-designated by Hiraizumi Town and was designated on 12 November 1971. It is located in Hiraizumi.
This is a tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, an image of Odaishi-sama. It is town-designated by Hiraizumi Town and was designated on 1 March 2016. It is located at Nagashima.
This is a tangible folk cultural property, a nenbutsu Buddha image. It is town-designated by Hiraizumi Town and was designated on 10 April 1982. It is located in Hiraizumi.
An intangible folk cultural property, a form of shishi-odori (deer dance) performing art. Town-designated by Hiraizumi Town on 1982-04-10. Located in Hiraizumi.

items.name: 達谷窟毘沙門神楽 長部神楽門

en.name_romaji: Takkoku no Iwaya Bishamon Kagura Osabe Kagura-mon
en.name_en: Takkoku no Iwaya Bishamon Kagura (Osabe Kagura Group)
en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, a kagura sacred dance tradition. Town-designated by Hiraizumi Town on 2001-11-01. Located at Osabe Kagura-mon.

items.name: エドヒガン（ヒガンザクラ）（1）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
